narrative:
Precinct Steubenville 6-1 (precinct in Jefferson County) has 709 registered voters, with 64.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 15.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.1 percentage points.
